## Type of change

## Affected surfaces

- [ ] API (`apps/api`)
- [ ] Web (`apps/web`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated (README / `docs/**` / inline)
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) if publishable packages changed
- [ ] OpenAPI spec updated if the API contract changed, and codegen re-run
- [ ] CI is green on this branch
- [ ] I have read the Responsible Use policy and this PR complies
